subject: chemistry
title: 21N.2.SL.TZ0.2
question_html: Explain the general increase in trend in the first ionization energies of the period 3 elements, Na to Ar.
solution_html:
increasing number of protons

OR

increasing nuclear charge ✔

 

«atomic» radius/size decreases

OR

same number of shells/electrons occupy same shell

OR

similar shielding «by inner electrons» ✔
